title: 宝塚記念の後に・受け取ったバトン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Kitasan Black and Brusquement run in their
own styles as they push themselves to their
absolute limits, pouring everything they have into
the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, they finally get the closure they never
found in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, we learn that Brusquement has
been injured. Kitasan Black is entrusted with her
rival's aspirations as well and sets her sights on
the autumn Tenno Sho!
